framework.name: KYA (Know Your Agent)
framework.description: Banks must perform KYC on software agents, not just humans. Blueprint: agent registry (publisher identity, deterministic versioning, attestation proofs, real-time revocation), delegation tokens (amount/frequency/merchant/time scopes with instant revocation and anomaly triggers), and agent-origin transaction flags with specific dispute codes. Critical insight: banks must OWN this requirement even if processors build it.
framework.raw_quote: If banks do not build it, Big Tech will, reducing the bank to a dumb pipe.

source.title: Agentic checkout beyond the hype: what European players can do to stay ...
